src/App.tsx:  // --- P2P MARKETPLACE / SHOP FUNCTIONS ---
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!currentUser) {
src/App.tsx:      setMarketplaceListings([]);
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const marketplaceCol = collection(db, "marketplace");
src/App.tsx:      const q = query(marketplaceCol, where("status", "==", "active"));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/App.tsx:        const items: any[] = [];
src/App.tsx:        snapshot.forEach((doc) => {
src/App.tsx:          items.push({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() });
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:        // Sort items newest first
src/App.tsx:        items.sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:          const timeA = a.createdAt?.seconds || 0;
src/App.tsx:          const timeB = b.createdAt?.seconds || 0;
src/App.tsx:          return timeB - timeA;
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:        setMarketplaceListings(items);
src/App.tsx:      }, (error) => {
src/App.tsx:        console.warn("Marketplace fetch/listen error:", error);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      return () => unsubscribe();
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Failed to initialize marketplace listener:", e);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  }, [currentUser]);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // --- LISTEN TO USER WITHDRAWALS ---
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!currentUser) {
src/App.tsx:      setUserWithdrawals([]);
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:      const withdrawalsCol = collection(db, "withdrawals");

src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/App.tsx:        const items: any[] = [];
src/App.tsx:        snapshot.forEach((docSnap) => {
src/App.tsx:          items.push({ id: docSnap.id, ...docSnap.data() });
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:        // Sort items newest first based on createdAt
src/App.tsx:        items.sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:          const timeA = a.createdAt?.seconds || a.createdAt?.toMillis?.() || 0;
src/App.tsx:          const timeB = b.createdAt?.seconds || b.createdAt?.toMillis?.() || 0;
src/App.tsx:          return timeB - timeA;
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:        setUserWithdrawals(items);
src/App.tsx:      }, (error) => {
src/App.tsx:        console.warn("Withdrawals listen error:", error);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      return () => unsubscribe();
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Failed to setup withdrawals listener:", e);
src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleCreateListing = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/App.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/App.tsx:    if (!currentUser) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Войдите в Google аккаунт, чтобы продавать предметы!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    const priceNum = Number(newListingPrice);
src/App.tsx:    if (!newListingTitle.trim()) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Введите название предмета!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (newListingTitle.length > 50) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Название предмета слишком длинное (макс. 50 символов)!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (!newListingDesc.trim()) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Введите описание предмета!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (newListingDesc.length > 250) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Описание слишком длинное (макс. 250 символов)!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (isNaN(priceNum) || priceNum <= 0) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Стоимость должна быть больше нуля!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    setIsSyncing(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      let resolvedImage = "";
src/App.tsx:      if (newListingImage === "custom") {
src/App.tsx:        resolvedImage = customListingImage.trim() || ITEM_MAP.custom;
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        resolvedImage = ITEM_MAP[newListingImage];
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const listingData = {
src/App.tsx:        title: newListingTitle.trim(),
src/App.tsx:        description: newListingDesc.trim(),
src/App.tsx:        price: priceNum,
src/App.tsx:        sellerId: currentUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:        itemImage: resolvedImage,
src/App.tsx:        sellerName: playerName || currentUser.displayName || "Игрок",
src/App.tsx:        status: "active",
src/App.tsx:        createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const marketplaceCol = collection(db, "marketplace");
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(marketplaceCol, listingData);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (activeSellingInventoryId) {
src/App.tsx:        const remainingItems = levelItems.filter(i => i.id !== activeSellingInventoryId);
src/App.tsx:        setLevelItems(remainingItems);
src/App.tsx:        setActiveSellingInventoryId(null);
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // Save remaining items to Firestore immediately to prevent items duplicating upon reload
src/App.tsx:        try {
src/App.tsx:          const userRef = doc(db, "users", currentUser.uid);
src/App.tsx:          await updateDoc(userRef, {
src/App.tsx:            levelItems: remainingItems,
src/App.tsx:            updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        } catch (dbErr) {
src/App.tsx:          console.warn("Failed to update inventory immediately inside publishListing:", dbErr);
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      addToast("🏪 Предмет успешно выставлен на продажу!");
src/App.tsx:      setNewListingTitle("");
src/App.tsx:      setNewListingDesc("");
src/App.tsx:      setNewListingPrice("");
src/App.tsx:      setCustomListingImage("");
src/App.tsx:      setIsAddingListing(false);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(err, OperationType.CREATE, "marketplace");
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsSyncing(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleCancelListing = async (listingId: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!currentUser) return;
src/App.tsx:    setIsSyncing(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const listingRef = doc(db, "marketplace", listingId);
src/App.tsx:      const userRef = doc(db, "users", currentUser.uid);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/App.tsx:        const listingSnap = await transaction.get(listingRef);
src/App.tsx:        const userSnap = await transaction.get(userRef);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        if (!listingSnap.exists()) {
src/App.tsx:          throw new Error("Этот лот не найден на рынке.");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        const listingData = listingSnap.data();
src/App.tsx:        if (listingData.sellerId !== currentUser.uid) {
src/App.tsx:          throw new Error("Вы можете отменять только свои лоты.");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        if (listingData.status !== "active") {
src/App.tsx:          throw new Error("Нельзя отменить лот, который уже куплен.");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Reconstruct the item to be returned to the inventory
src/App.tsx:        const restoredItem: any = {
src/App.tsx:          id: `restored-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8)}`,
src/App.tsx:          title: listingData.title,
src/App.tsx:          desc: listingData.description || "Возвращено с рынка",
src/App.tsx:          img: listingData.itemImage && listingData.itemImage.startsWith("http") ? "custom" : listingData.itemImage || "sword",
src/App.tsx:          category: "purchased"
src/App.tsx:        };
src/App.tsx:        if (listingData.itemImage && listingData.itemImage.startsWith("http")) {
src/App.tsx:          restoredItem.customImg = listingData.itemImage;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        const currentItems = userSnap.exists() && Array.isArray(userSnap.data().levelItems)
src/App.tsx:          ? userSnap.data().levelItems
src/App.tsx:          : levelItems;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        const updatedItems = [...currentItems, restoredItem];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Delete listing from marketplace
src/App.tsx:        transaction.delete(listingRef);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Update the seller document
src/App.tsx:        if (userSnap.exists()) {
src/App.tsx:          transaction.update(userRef, {
src/App.tsx:            levelItems: updatedItems,
src/App.tsx:            updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          transaction.set(userRef, {
src/App.tsx:            coins: coins,
src/App.tsx:            clickPowerLevel: clickPowerLevel || 1,
src/App.tsx:            autoClickerLevel: autoClickerLevel || 0,
src/App.tsx:            energyLevel: energyLevel || 1,
src/App.tsx:            energy: energy ?? 100,
src/App.tsx:            maxEnergy: maxEnergy ?? 100,
src/App.tsx:            regenRate: regenRate || 1,
src/App.tsx:            totalClicks: totalClicks || 0,
src/App.tsx:            playerName: playerName || "Игрок",
src/App.tsx:            playerClan: playerClan || null,
src/App.tsx:            levelItems: updatedItems,
src/App.tsx:            currentQuest: currentQuest || null,
src/App.tsx:            notificationsEnabled: notificationsEnabled !== false,
src/App.tsx:            updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Update local state inside the transaction
src/App.tsx:        setLevelItems(updatedItems);
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      addToast("🏪 Предмет возвращен в ваш инвентарь!");
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast(`❌ Ошибка отмены: ${err.message || err}`);
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Cancel listing error:", err);
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsSyncing(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleMessageSeller = (sellerId: string, sellerName: string, itemTitle: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    setActiveMainTab("social");
src/App.tsx:    setActiveSocialTab("friends");
src/App.tsx:    setActiveFriendChatId(sellerId);
src/App.tsx:    setFriendChatMessageText(`Привет! Я насчет предмета "${itemTitle}"... `);
src/App.tsx:    setSelectedListing(null);
src/App.tsx:    setIsShopOpen(false);
src/App.tsx:    addToast(`💬 Открыт личный чат с продавцом ${sellerName}!`);
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleBuyItem = async (listing: any) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!currentUser) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Войдите в аккаунт, чтобы покупать предметы!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (listing.sellerId === currentUser.uid) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Вы не можете купить собственный предмет!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (coins < listing.price) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast(`⚠️ Недостаточно монет! Требуется ${listing.price} 💰`);
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    setIsSyncing(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const buyerRef = doc(db, "users", currentUser.uid);
src/App.tsx:      const sellerRef = doc(db, "users", listing.sellerId);
src/App.tsx:      const listingRef = doc(db, "marketplace", listing.id);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const boughtItem: any = {
src/App.tsx:        id: `purchased-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 8)}`,
src/App.tsx:        title: listing.title,
src/App.tsx:        desc: listing.description || "Куплено на рынке",
src/App.tsx:        img: listing.itemImage && listing.itemImage.startsWith("http") ? "custom" : listing.itemImage || "sword",
src/App.tsx:        category: "purchased"
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:      if (listing.itemImage && listing.itemImage.startsWith("http")) {
src/App.tsx:        boughtItem.customImg = listing.itemImage;
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/App.tsx:        const buyerSnap = await transaction.get(buyerRef);
src/App.tsx:        const sellerSnap = await transaction.get(sellerRef);
src/App.tsx:        const listingSnap = await transaction.get(listingRef);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        if (!listingSnap.exists() || listingSnap.data().status !== "active") {
src/App.tsx:          throw new Error("Предмет уже продан или более не доступен.");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        const currentBuyerCoins = buyerSnap.exists() ? (buyerSnap.data().coins || 0) : coins;
src/App.tsx:        if (currentBuyerCoins < listing.price) {
src/App.tsx:          throw new Error("Недостаточно монет на балансе в облаке.");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        const currentBuyerItems = buyerSnap.exists() && Array.isArray(buyerSnap.data().levelItems)
src/App.tsx:          ? buyerSnap.data().levelItems
src/App.tsx:          : levelItems;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        const updatedBuyerItems = [...currentBuyerItems, boughtItem];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Update listing status
src/App.tsx:        transaction.update(listingRef, {
src/App.tsx:          status: "sold",
src/App.tsx:          buyerId: currentUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:          soldAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Deduct coins and update levelItems for buyer atomically in Firestore
src/App.tsx:        if (buyerSnap.exists()) {
src/App.tsx:          transaction.update(buyerRef, {
src/App.tsx:            coins: currentBuyerCoins - listing.price,
src/App.tsx:            levelItems: updatedBuyerItems,
src/App.tsx:            updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          transaction.set(buyerRef, {
src/App.tsx:            coins: currentBuyerCoins - listing.price,
src/App.tsx:            clickPowerLevel: clickPowerLevel || 1,
src/App.tsx:            autoClickerLevel: autoClickerLevel || 0,
src/App.tsx:            energyLevel: energyLevel || 1,
src/App.tsx:            energy: energy ?? 100,
src/App.tsx:            maxEnergy: maxEnergy ?? 100,
src/App.tsx:            regenRate: regenRate || 1,
src/App.tsx:            totalClicks: totalClicks || 0,
src/App.tsx:            playerName: playerName || "Игрок",
src/App.tsx:            playerClan: playerClan || null,
src/App.tsx:            levelItems: updatedBuyerItems,
src/App.tsx:            currentQuest: currentQuest || null,
src/App.tsx:            notificationsEnabled: notificationsEnabled !== false,
src/App.tsx:            updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        // Credit seller atomically
src/App.tsx:        if (sellerSnap.exists()) {
src/App.tsx:          const currentSellerCoins = sellerSnap.data().coins || 0;
src/App.tsx:          transaction.update(sellerRef, {
src/App.tsx:            coins: currentSellerCoins + listing.price,
src/App.tsx:            updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:          });
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // Update states locally
src/App.tsx:      setCoins(prev => prev - listing.price);
src/App.tsx:      setLevelItems(prev => [...prev, boughtItem]);
src/App.tsx:      addToast(`🎉 Вы успешно купили "${listing.title}" за ${listing.price} комнов!`);
src/App.tsx:      logUserAction("Купил предмет на рынке: " + listing.title, coins - listing.price);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      setPurchasedListingId(listing.id);
src/App.tsx:      setIsBuying(true);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Attempt to log the trade to the Google sheet
src/App.tsx:      fetch(getApiUrl("/api/log-trade"), {
src/App.tsx:        method: "POST",
src/App.tsx:        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
src/App.tsx:        body: JSON.stringify({
src/App.tsx:          buyerId: currentUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:          sellerId: listing.sellerId,
src/App.tsx:          itemTitle: listing.title,
src/App.tsx:          price: listing.price
src/App.tsx:        })
src/App.tsx:      }).catch(err => console.error("Failed to log trade to sheet:", err));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      setTimeout(() => {
src/App.tsx:        setPurchasedListingId(null);
src/App.tsx:        setSelectedListing(null);
src/App.tsx:        setIsBuying(false);
src/App.tsx:      }, 1000);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err: any) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast(`❌ Ошибка покупки: ${err.message || err}`);
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Purchase error details:", err);

src/App.tsx:    if (!file) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (!file.type.startsWith("image/")) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Пожалуйста, выберите изображение!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Файл слишком большой! Лимит 5МБ.");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const reader = new FileReader();
src/App.tsx:    reader.onload = (event) => {
src/App.tsx:      const imgElement = new Image();
src/App.tsx:      imgElement.src = event.target?.result as string;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      imgElement.onload = () => {
src/App.tsx:        const MAX_SIZE = 150;
src/App.tsx:        let width = imgElement.width;
src/App.tsx:        let height = imgElement.height;
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        if (width > height) {
src/App.tsx:          if (width > MAX_SIZE) {
src/App.tsx:            height = Math.round((height * MAX_SIZE) / width);
src/App.tsx:            width = MAX_SIZE;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          if (height > MAX_SIZE) {
src/App.tsx:            width = Math.round((width * MAX_SIZE) / height);
src/App.tsx:            height = MAX_SIZE;
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        const canvas = document.createElement("canvas");
src/App.tsx:        canvas.width = width;
src/App.tsx:        canvas.height = height;
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
src/App.tsx:        if (ctx) {
src/App.tsx:          ctx.drawImage(imgElement, 0, 0, width, height);
src/App.tsx:          const compressedBase64 = canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg", 0.75);
src/App.tsx:          setCustomListingImage(compressedBase64);
src/App.tsx:          addToast("📸 Картинка успешно загружена!");
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      };
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:    reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:    );
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const parseChatMessageText = (text: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!text) return "";
src/App.tsx:    const mentionRegex = /@([a-zA-ZА-Яа-я0-9_ёЁ\-]+)/g;
src/App.tsx:    const parts = [];
src/App.tsx:    let lastIndex = 0;
src/App.tsx:    let match;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    while ((match = mentionRegex.exec(text)) !== null) {
src/App.tsx:      const matchIndex = match.index;
src/App.tsx:      const wholeMention = match[0];
src/App.tsx:      const username = match[1];
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      if (matchIndex > lastIndex) {
src/App.tsx:        parts.push(text.substring(lastIndex, matchIndex));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const isCurrentUser = username.toLowerCase() === playerName.toLowerCase() || username.toLowerCase() === "всем" || username.toLowerCase() === "all";
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      parts.push(
src/App.tsx:        <span 
src/App.tsx:          key={matchIndex} 
src/App.tsx:          className={`px-1 rounded-md font-extrabold border select-all ${
src/App.tsx:            isCurrentUser 
src/App.tsx:              ? "bg-amber-500/35 text-amber-300 border-amber-500/50 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)] animate-pulse" 
src/App.tsx:              : "bg-indigo-500/20 text-indigo-300 border-indigo-500/30"
src/App.tsx:          }`}
src/App.tsx:        >
src/App.tsx:          {wholeMention}
src/App.tsx:        </span>
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      lastIndex = mentionRegex.lastIndex;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    if (lastIndex < text.length) {
src/App.tsx:      parts.push(text.substring(lastIndex));
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    return parts.length > 0 ? parts : text;
src/App.tsx:  };

src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleExchangeCoins = async (amount: number) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Пожалуйста, введите корректное количество коинов");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (coins < amount) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Недостаточно коинов на балансе!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    setIsExchanging(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      // 1KK (1,000,000) coins cost is coinExchangeRate rubles
src/App.tsx:      const rublesGained = parseFloat(((amount / 1000000) * coinExchangeRate).toFixed(4));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const newCoins = coins - amount;
src/App.tsx:      const newRubles = parseFloat((rubles + rublesGained).toFixed(4));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      setCoins(newCoins);
src/App.tsx:      setRubles(newRubles);
src/App.tsx:      setExchangeCoinsAmount("");
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Save locally
src/App.tsx:      const saved = safeGetItem("gameDataV9");
src/App.tsx:      if (saved) {
src/App.tsx:        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
src/App.tsx:        parsed.coins = newCoins;
src/App.tsx:        parsed.rubles = newRubles;
src/App.tsx:        safeSetItem("gameDataV9", JSON.stringify(parsed));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Save to Firestore
src/App.tsx:      if (auth.currentUser) {
src/App.tsx:        const docRef = doc(db, "users", auth.currentUser.uid);
src/App.tsx:        await setDoc(docRef, { coins: newCoins, rubles: newRubles }, { merge: true });
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // Log custom action to history
src/App.tsx:        await addDoc(collection(db, "user_actions"), {
src/App.tsx:          userId: auth.currentUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:          playerName: playerName || "Игрок",
src/App.tsx:          action: "Продажа коинов",
src/App.tsx:          coins: newCoins,
src/App.tsx:          details: `Продано ${amount.toLocaleString()} CON за ${rublesGained.toFixed(2)} ₽ по курсу ${coinExchangeRate.toFixed(3)} ₽/1KK`,
src/App.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      addToast(`🎉 Продано ${amount.toLocaleString()} коинов за +${rublesGained.toFixed(2)} ₽!`);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e: any) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Exchange error:", e);
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Ошибка проведения обмена");
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsExchanging(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleExchangeRubles = async (rubAmount: number) => {
src/App.tsx:    if (isNaN(rubAmount) || rubAmount <= 0) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Введите корректную сумму в рублях");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (rubles < rubAmount) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Недостаточно рублей на балансе!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    setIsExchanging(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      // 1KK (1,000,000) coins cost is coinExchangeRate rubles
src/App.tsx:      const coinsGained = Math.floor((rubAmount / coinExchangeRate) * 1000000);
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const newCoins = coins + coinsGained;
src/App.tsx:      const newRubles = parseFloat((rubles - rubAmount).toFixed(4));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      setCoins(newCoins);
src/App.tsx:      setRubles(newRubles);
src/App.tsx:      setExchangeRublesAmount("");
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Save locally
src/App.tsx:      const saved = safeGetItem("gameDataV9");
src/App.tsx:      if (saved) {
src/App.tsx:        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
src/App.tsx:        parsed.coins = newCoins;
src/App.tsx:        parsed.rubles = newRubles;
src/App.tsx:        safeSetItem("gameDataV9", JSON.stringify(parsed));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Save to Firestore
src/App.tsx:      if (auth.currentUser) {
src/App.tsx:        const docRef = doc(db, "users", auth.currentUser.uid);
src/App.tsx:        await setDoc(docRef, { coins: newCoins, rubles: newRubles }, { merge: true });
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // Log custom action to history
src/App.tsx:        await addDoc(collection(db, "user_actions"), {
src/App.tsx:          userId: auth.currentUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:          playerName: playerName || "Игрок",
src/App.tsx:          action: "Покупка коинов",
src/App.tsx:          coins: newCoins,

src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      addToast(`🎉 Приобретено ${coinsGained.toLocaleString()} коинов за ${rubAmount.toFixed(2)} ₽!`);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e: any) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Exchange rubles error:", e);
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Ошибка проведения обмена");
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsExchanging(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const [withdrawStep, setWithdrawStep] = useState<string | null>(null);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleWithdrawRubles = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    const amount = parseFloat(withdrawAmount);
src/App.tsx:    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Пожалуйста, введите корректную сумму для вывода");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (amount < 5) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Минимальная сумма вывода составляет 5.00 ₽");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (rubles < amount) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Недостаточно рублей на балансе!");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    if (!withdrawDetails.trim()) {
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Пожалуйста, укажите реквизиты получателя");
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    setIsWithdrawing(true);
src/App.tsx:    setWithdrawStep("Создание заявки на выплату...");
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600));
src/App.tsx:      setWithdrawStep("Резервирование баланса...");
src/App.tsx:      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500));
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const newRubles = parseFloat((rubles - amount).toFixed(4));
src/App.tsx:      setRubles(newRubles);
src/App.tsx:      setWithdrawAmount("");
src/App.tsx:      setWithdrawDetails("");
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Save locally
src/App.tsx:      const saved = safeGetItem("gameDataV9");
src/App.tsx:      if (saved) {
src/App.tsx:        const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
src/App.tsx:        parsed.rubles = newRubles;
src/App.tsx:        safeSetItem("gameDataV9", JSON.stringify(parsed));
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      // Save to Firestore
src/App.tsx:      if (auth.currentUser) {
src/App.tsx:        const docRef = doc(db, "users", auth.currentUser.uid);
src/App.tsx:        await setDoc(docRef, { rubles: newRubles }, { merge: true });
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // Log withdrawal to user_actions
src/App.tsx:        await addDoc(collection(db, "user_actions"), {
src/App.tsx:          userId: auth.currentUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:          playerName: playerName || "Игрок",
src/App.tsx:          action: "Запрос вывода средств",
src/App.tsx:          coins: coins,
src/App.tsx:          details: `Создана заявка на вывод ${amount.toFixed(2)} ₽ на ${withdrawSystem.toUpperCase()} (${withdrawDetails}). Статус: Ожидание.`,
src/App.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // Log to dedicated withdrawals collection
src/App.tsx:        await addDoc(collection(db, "withdrawals"), {
src/App.tsx:          userId: auth.currentUser.uid,
src/App.tsx:          playerName: playerName || "Игрок",
src/App.tsx:          amount: amount,
src/App.tsx:          system: withdrawSystem,
src/App.tsx:          details: withdrawDetails,
src/App.tsx:          status: "pending",
src/App.tsx:          createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/App.tsx:        });
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      addToast(`🎉 Заявка на ${amount.toFixed(2)} ₽ успешно создана и отправлена администратору на одобрение!`);
src/App.tsx:    } catch (e: any) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Withdraw error:", e);
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Ошибка обработки вывода");
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsWithdrawing(false);
src/App.tsx:      setWithdrawStep(null);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const renderShopContent = () => {

src/App.tsx:    const filteredListings = marketplaceListings

src/App.tsx:        const matchesSearch = listing.title.toLowerCase().includes(shopSearchQuery.toLowerCase());
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // 2. Category filter
src/App.tsx:        let matchesCategory = true;
src/App.tsx:        if (shopCategory !== "all") {
src/App.tsx:          if (shopCategory === "custom") {
src/App.tsx:            const img = String(listing.itemImage);
src/App.tsx:            matchesCategory = !img.includes("item_sword") && !img.includes("item_potion") && !img.includes("item_shield");
src/App.tsx:          } else {

src/App.tsx:            const imageStr = String(listing.itemImage);
src/App.tsx:            if (shopCategory === "weapons") {
src/App.tsx:              matchesCategory = imageStr.includes("item_sword") || imageStr.includes("item_shield");
src/App.tsx:            } else if (shopCategory === "potions") {
src/App.tsx:              matchesCategory = imageStr.includes("item_potion");
src/App.tsx:            }
src/App.tsx:          }
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // 3. Min price
src/App.tsx:        const minPrice = Number(shopPriceMin);
src/App.tsx:        const matchesMin = !shopPriceMin || isNaN(minPrice) || listing.price >= minPrice;
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        // 4. Max price
src/App.tsx:        const maxPrice = Number(shopPriceMax);
src/App.tsx:        const matchesMax = !shopPriceMax || isNaN(maxPrice) || listing.price <= maxPrice;
src/App.tsx:        
src/App.tsx:        return matchesSearch && matchesCategory && matchesMin && matchesMax;
src/App.tsx:      })
src/App.tsx:      .sort((a, b) => {
src/App.tsx:        if (shopSort === "price_asc") {
src/App.tsx:          return a.price - b.price;
src/App.tsx:        } else if (shopSort === "price_desc") {
src/App.tsx:          return b.price - a.price;
src/App.tsx:        } else {
src/App.tsx:          // newest
src/App.tsx:          const timeA = a.createdAt?.seconds || 0;
src/App.tsx:          const timeB = b.createdAt?.seconds || 0;
src/App.tsx:          return timeB - timeA;
src/App.tsx:        }
src/App.tsx:      });

src/App.tsx:    return (

src/App.tsx:  const handleSearchPlayers = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!playerSearchQuery.trim()) {
src/App.tsx:      setCustomSearchResults(null);
src/App.tsx:      return;
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:    setIsSearchingFirestore(true);
src/App.tsx:    addToast("🔍 Поиск игроков по всей базе...");
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const q = query(collection(db, "users"), limit(150));
src/App.tsx:      const snap = await getDocs(q);
src/App.tsx:      const allDbPlayers = snap.docs.map(d => {
src/App.tsx:        const data = d.data();
src/App.tsx:        return {
src/App.tsx:          id: d.id,
src/App.tsx:          name: data.playerName || data.name || data.displayName || "Без имени",
src/App.tsx:          coins: data.coins || 0,
src/App.tsx:          clan: data.playerClan || data.clan || null,
src/App.tsx:          photoURL: data.photoURL || null,
src/App.tsx:          isOnline: onlinePlayers.some(op => op.id === d.id)
src/App.tsx:        };
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:      const queryLower = playerSearchQuery.toLowerCase();
src/App.tsx:      const filtered = allDbPlayers.filter(p => 
src/App.tsx:        p.id !== effectivePlayerId && 
src/App.tsx:        (p.name.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower) || (p.clan || "").toLowerCase().includes(queryLower))
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:      setCustomSearchResults(filtered);
src/App.tsx:      if (filtered.length === 0) {
src/App.tsx:        addToast(`😟 Игроки по запросу "${playerSearchQuery}" не найдены`);
src/App.tsx:      } else {
src/App.tsx:        addToast(`✅ Найдено пользователей: ${filtered.length}`);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Firestore global user search error:", err);
src/App.tsx:      // Fallback matching online players only
src/App.tsx:      const foundOnline = onlinePlayers.filter(p => 
src/App.tsx:        p.id !== effectivePlayerId && 
src/App.tsx:        p.name.toLowerCase().includes(playerSearchQuery.toLowerCase())
src/App.tsx:      );
src/App.tsx:      setCustomSearchResults(foundOnline);
src/App.tsx:      addToast("⚠️ Ошибка; поиск выполнен по игрокам в сети");

src/App.tsx:      setIsSearchingFirestore(false);
src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:                                textArea.style.position = "fixed";

src/App.tsx:                                document.body.appendChild(textArea);

src/App.tsx:                                document.body.removeChild(textArea);
src/App.tsx:                              } catch (e) {

src/App.tsx:                              }

src/App.tsx:    // Format countdown or left time (with seconds support!)
src/App.tsx:    const formatTimeLeft = (sec: number) => {
src/App.tsx:      const days = Math.floor(sec / 86400);
src/App.tsx:      const hours = Math.floor((sec % 86400) / 3600);
src/App.tsx:      const minutes = Math.floor((sec % 3600) / 60);
src/App.tsx:      const seconds = sec % 60;
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      const parts = [];
src/App.tsx:      if (days > 0) parts.push(`${days}д`);
src/App.tsx:      if (hours > 0) parts.push(`${hours}ч`);
src/App.tsx:      if (minutes > 0 || (days === 0 && hours === 0)) parts.push(`${minutes}м`);
src/App.tsx:      parts.push(`${seconds}с`);
src/App.tsx:      return parts.join(" ");
src/App.tsx:    };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    // Calculate real-time battle details directly from server state
src/App.tsx:    const warPoints = clanWarState?.clansWarPoints || {};
src/App.tsx:    const scoresLeft = warPoints[playerClan || ""] || 0;
src/App.tsx:    
src/App.tsx:    // Find highest competing rival
src/App.tsx:    const otherClans = Object.entries(warPoints).filter(([name]) => name !== playerClan);

src/App.tsx:    }

src/App.tsx:      const y = Math.random() * (rect.height - 40) + 10;

src/App.tsx:        `💥 УДАР! +${clickPowerLevel * 10} ОЧКОВ`,
src/App.tsx:        `⚔️ КРИТ! +${clickPowerLevel * 20} ОЧКОВ`,

src/App.tsx:      ][Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)];

src/App.tsx:      const newEffect = {
src/App.tsx:        id: Date.now() + Math.random(),
src/App.tsx:        x,
src/App.tsx:        y,
src/App.tsx:        text: randomText
src/App.tsx:      };

src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    setIsProcessingWithdrawalId(withdrawalId);
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    try {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      // 1. Update withdrawal status

src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      // 2. Refund rubles to player

src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      if (userSnap.exists()) {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        const currentRubles = typeof userSnap.data().rubles === "number" ? userSnap.data().rubles : 0;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        const refundedRubles = parseFloat((currentRubles + amount).toFixed(4));
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        await updateDoc(userRef, { rubles: refundedRubles });
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      } else {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        await setDoc(userRef, { rubles: amount }, { merge: true });
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      }
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      // Log to actions
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, "user_actions"), {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        userId: "admin",

src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        action: "Отклонение выплаты",
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        coins: 0,

src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      });
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      addToast("✅ Выплата отклонена, рубли возвращены игроку!");

src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:  // Filter and sort the logged actions based on date, search term and sort fields
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:  const filteredAndSortedActions = React.useMemo(() => {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    let result = [...userActions];
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    // Filter by start date
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    if (actionStartDate) {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      const startMs = new Date(actionStartDate + "T00:00:00").getTime();
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      result = result.filter(act => {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        const actMs = act.timestamp?.toMillis ? act.timestamp.toMillis() : (act.timestamp ? new Date(act.timestamp).getTime() : 0);
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        return actMs >= startMs;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      });
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    }
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    // Filter by end date
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    if (actionEndDate) {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      const endMs = new Date(actionEndDate + "T23:59:59").getTime();
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      result = result.filter(act => {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        const actMs = act.timestamp?.toMillis ? act.timestamp.toMillis() : (act.timestamp ? new Date(act.timestamp).getTime() : 0);
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        return actMs <= endMs;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      });
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    }
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    // Filter by search term (player name, UID, or action type)
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    if (actionSearchTerm.trim()) {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      const term = actionSearchTerm.toLowerCase();
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      result = result.filter(act => 
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        (act.playerName || "").toLowerCase().includes(term) || 
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        (act.userId || "").toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        (act.action || "").toLowerCase().includes(term)
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      );
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    }
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    // Sort the list
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    result.sort((a, b) => {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      let valA: any = 0;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      let valB: any = 0;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      if (actionSortField === "timestamp") {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        valA = a.timestamp?.toMillis ? a.timestamp.toMillis() : (a.timestamp ? new Date(a.timestamp).getTime() : 0);
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        valB = b.timestamp?.toMillis ? b.timestamp.toMillis() : (b.timestamp ? new Date(b.timestamp).getTime() : 0);
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      } else {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        valA = a[actionSortField] || 0;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        valB = b[actionSortField] || 0;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      }
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      if (valA < valB) return actionSortOrder === "asc" ? -1 : 1;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      if (valA > valB) return actionSortOrder === "asc" ? 1 : -1;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      return 0;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    });
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    return result;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:  }, [userActions, actionStartDate, actionEndDate, actionSearchTerm, actionSortField, actionSortOrder]);

src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:  const handleSupportReply = async (ticketId: string, chatIdOrTelegramId: number, replyText: string) => {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    if (!replyText.trim()) return;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    setSendingReplies(prev => ({ ...prev, [ticketId]: true }));
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:    try {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      const res = await fetch(getApiUrl("/api/support-reply"), {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        method: "POST",
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        body: JSON.stringify({ chatId: chatIdOrTelegramId, message: replyText })
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      });
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      if (res.ok) {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        try {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:          await updateDoc(doc(db, "support_tickets", ticketId), {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:            status: "closed",
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:            isRead: true,
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:            adminReply: replyText,
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:            answeredAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:          });
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        } catch (dbErr) {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:          handleFirestoreError(dbErr, OperationType.UPDATE, `support_tickets/${ticketId}`);
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        }
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        addToast("Ответ успешно отправлен пользователю!");
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        setReplyTexts(prev => {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:          const updated = { ...prev };
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:          delete updated[ticketId];
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:          return updated;
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        });
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:      } else {
src/components/AdminConsole.tsx:        const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));

server.ts:function isValidGoogleSheetId(id: string | null | undefined): boolean {
server.ts:  if (!id) return false;
server.ts:  const trimmed = id.trim();
server.ts:  // A valid Google Spreadsheet ID is usually 44 characters, let's enforce a length check and standard format
server.ts:  return trimmed.length >= 20 && /^[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+$/.test(trimmed) && trimmed !== "∆Mr.";
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function appendToGoogleSheet(spreadsheetId: string, values: any[]) {
server.ts:  if (!isValidGoogleSheetId(spreadsheetId)) {
server.ts:    console.log(`Skipping append: "${spreadsheetId}" is not a valid Google Spreadsheet ID.`);
server.ts:    return;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  const auth = new google.auth.GoogleAuth({
server.ts:    scopes: ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets'],
server.ts:  });
server.ts:  const authClient = await auth.getClient();
server.ts:  const sheets = google.sheets({ version: 'v4', auth: authClient as any });
server.ts:
server.ts:  const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear().toString();
server.ts:  let targetSheetName = currentYear;
server.ts:
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const sheetMeta = await sheets.spreadsheets.get({ spreadsheetId });
server.ts:    const existingSheet = sheetMeta.data.sheets?.find(s => s.properties?.title === currentYear);
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (!existingSheet) {
server.ts:      await sheets.spreadsheets.batchUpdate({
server.ts:        spreadsheetId,
server.ts:        requestBody: {
server.ts:          requests: [{
server.ts:            addSheet: {
server.ts:              properties: {
server.ts:                title: currentYear
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          }]
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:    console.error("Failed to ensure year sheet exists, falling back to first sheet:", err.message);
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const sheetMeta = await sheets.spreadsheets.get({ spreadsheetId });
server.ts:      targetSheetName = sheetMeta.data.sheets?.[0]?.properties?.title || 'Sheet1';
server.ts:    } catch(e) {
server.ts:      targetSheetName = 'Sheet1';
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  await sheets.spreadsheets.values.append({
server.ts:    spreadsheetId,
server.ts:    range: `'${targetSheetName}'!A1`,
server.ts:    valueInputOption: 'RAW',
server.ts:    requestBody: {
server.ts:      values: [values],
server.ts:    },
server.ts:  });
server.ts:}

server.ts:async function getGoogleSheetValues(spreadsheetId: string, range: string): Promise<any[][] | null> {
server.ts:  if (!isValidGoogleSheetId(spreadsheetId)) {
server.ts:    console.log(`Skipping read: "${spreadsheetId}" is not a valid Google Spreadsheet ID.`);
server.ts:    return null;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const auth = new google.auth.GoogleAuth({
server.ts:      scopes: ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets.readonly'],
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    const authClient = await auth.getClient();
server.ts:    const sheets = google.sheets({ version: 'v4', auth: authClient as any });
server.ts:    
server.ts:    let finalRange = range;
server.ts:    if (range.startsWith('Sheet1!')) {
server.ts:      const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear().toString();
server.ts:      const sheetMeta = await sheets.spreadsheets.get({ spreadsheetId });
server.ts:      const existingSheet = sheetMeta.data.sheets?.find(s => s.properties?.title === currentYear);
server.ts:      const targetSheetName = existingSheet ? currentYear : (sheetMeta.data.sheets?.[0]?.properties?.title || 'Sheet1');
server.ts:      finalRange = range.replace('Sheet1!', `'${targetSheetName}'!`);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    const res = await sheets.spreadsheets.values.get({
server.ts:      spreadsheetId,
server.ts:      range: finalRange,
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    return res.data.values || null;
server.ts:  } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:    console.error(`Error reading Google Sheet values (${spreadsheetId}):`, err.message || err);
server.ts:    return null;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}

server.ts:let currentMarketplaceListings: any[] = [];
server.ts:
server.ts:async function listenToMarketplace() {
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const dbInstance = await getAuthenticatedDb();
server.ts:    if (!dbInstance) {
server.ts:      console.warn("[Marketplace Sync] Database not available, skipping listener.");
server.ts:      return;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    const marketplaceCol = collection(dbInstance, "marketplace");
server.ts:    const q = query(marketplaceCol, where("status", "==", "active"));
server.ts:    
server.ts:    onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
server.ts:      const items: any[] = [];
server.ts:      snapshot.forEach((doc) => {
server.ts:        items.push({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() });
server.ts:      });
server.ts:      // Sort items newest first
server.ts:      items.sort((a, b) => {
server.ts:        const timeA = a.createdAt?.seconds || 0;
server.ts:        const timeB = b.createdAt?.seconds || 0;
server.ts:        return timeB - timeA;
server.ts:      });
server.ts:      currentMarketplaceListings = items;
server.ts:      console.log(`[Marketplace Sync] Broadcasting ${items.length} active listings via WebSocket`);
server.ts:      broadcast({
server.ts:        type: "marketplace_update",
server.ts:        data: items
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    }, (error) => {
server.ts:      console.error("[Marketplace Sync] error in onSnapshot:", error);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  } catch (err) {
server.ts:    console.error("[Marketplace Sync] init failed:", err);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:let isHydrated = false;
server.ts:
server.ts:async function syncUsersFromFirestore() {
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const dbInstance = await getAuthenticatedDb();
server.ts:    if (!dbInstance) {
server.ts:      console.warn("[Users Sync] Database not available, skipping hydration.");
server.ts:      return;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    const usersCol = collection(dbInstance, "users");
server.ts:    
server.ts:    console.log("[Users Sync] Subscribing to 'users' collection in Firestore 24/7...");
server.ts:    onSnapshot(usersCol, (snapshot) => {
server.ts:      snapshot.docChanges().forEach((change) => {
server.ts:        const id = change.doc.id;
server.ts:        const data = change.doc.data();
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (change.type === "added" || change.type === "modified") {
server.ts:          const existing = players.get(id);
server.ts:          
server.ts:          players.set(id, {
server.ts:            id: id,
server.ts:            name: data.playerName || data.name || "Игрок",
server.ts:            clan: data.playerClan || data.clan || null,
server.ts:            coins: typeof data.coins === "number" ? data.coins : 0,
server.ts:            clicks: typeof data.totalClicks === "number" ? data.totalClicks : (typeof data.clicks === "number" ? data.clicks : 0),
server.ts:            color: existing?.color || data.color || getRandomColor(),
server.ts:            lastSeen: data.lastActiveTimestamp || data.lastSeen || Date.now(),
server.ts:            isOnline: existing?.isOnline ?? false,
server.ts:            telegramId: data.telegramId || null,
server.ts:            username: data.username || null,
server.ts:            sheetId: data.sheetId || null,
server.ts:            notificationsEnabled: data.notificationsEnabled !== false,
server.ts:            clickPowerLevel: data.clickPowerLevel || 1,
server.ts:            autoClickerLevel: typeof data.autoClickerLevel === "number" ? data.autoClickerLevel : 0
server.ts:          });
server.ts:        } else if (change.type === "removed") {
server.ts:          players.delete(id);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (!isHydrated) {
server.ts:        isHydrated = true;
server.ts:        console.log(`[Users Sync] Initial hydration complete. Total players loaded: ${players.size}`);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Update everyone with active stats and names
server.ts:      broadcastPlayers();
server.ts:    }, (error) => {
server.ts:      console.error("[Users Sync] error in onSnapshot:", error);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:  } catch (err) {
server.ts:    console.error("[Users Sync] Failed to initialize real-time user sync:", err);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:function broadcastClanWarState() {
server.ts:  broadcast({
server.ts:    type: "clan_war_update",
server.ts:    data: clanWarState
server.ts:  });
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:function getPlayerLevel(clicks: number) {
server.ts:  let lvl = 1;
server.ts:  while (clicks >= lvl * (lvl + 1) * 35) {
server.ts:    lvl++;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  return lvl;
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:function calculateClanProduction() {
server.ts:  const scores: { [clanName: string]: number } = {};
server.ts:  for (const player of players.values()) {
server.ts:    if (player.clan) {
server.ts:      if (!scores[player.clan]) {
server.ts:        scores[player.clan] = 0;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      const lvl = player.autoClickerLevel || 0;
server.ts:      const cps = Math.ceil(lvl * 0.5) || 0;
server.ts:      scores[player.clan] += cps;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  return scores;
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:// Memory-safe, instant, and double-fetch prevention lookup for Telegram players
server.ts:function findSyncPlayerByTelegram(tgId: string | null | undefined, username?: string, firstName?: string) {
server.ts:  if (!tgId && !username && !firstName) return null;
server.ts:  const targetTgId = tgId ? String(tgId).trim() : null;
server.ts:  const targetUsername = username ? String(username).toLowerCase().trim() : null;
server.ts:  const targetPlayerName = firstName ? String(firstName).toLowerCase().trim() : null;
server.ts:  
server.ts:  for (const p of players.values()) {
server.ts:    const dbTgId = p.telegramId ? String(p.telegramId).trim() : null;
server.ts:    const dbUsername = p.username ? String(p.username).toLowerCase().trim() : null;
server.ts:    const dbPlayerName = p.name ? String(p.name).toLowerCase().trim() : null;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    const isTgIdMatch = targetTgId && (dbTgId === targetTgId || dbTgId === String(Number(targetTgId)));
server.ts:    const isUsernameMatch = targetUsername && dbUsername === targetUsername;
server.ts:    const isPlayerNameMatch = targetPlayerName && dbPlayerName === targetPlayerName;
server.ts:
server.ts:    if (isTgIdMatch || isUsernameMatch || isPlayerNameMatch) {
server.ts:      return p;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  return null;
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:// Helper to broadcast data to all active websockets
server.ts:function broadcast(data: any) {
server.ts:  const payload = JSON.stringify(data);
server.ts:  wss.clients.forEach((client) => {
server.ts:    if (client.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
server.ts:      client.send(payload);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:}

server.ts:    name,
server.ts:    isPrivate: !!c.password
server.ts:  }));
server.ts:}

server.ts:function broadcastPlayers() {
server.ts:  const playersList = Array.from(players.values()).map(p => ({
server.ts:    ...p,
server.ts:    isAdmin: admins.includes(p.id),
server.ts:    isModerator: moderators.includes(p.id)
server.ts:  }));
server.ts:  broadcast({
server.ts:    type: "players_update",
server.ts:    data: {
server.ts:      players: playersList,
server.ts:      clanPrivacy: getClansPrivacyList()
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:// Color palettes for players in chat
server.ts:const PLAYER_COLORS = [
server.ts:  "#e67e22", // orange
server.ts:  "#2ecc71", // green
server.ts:  "#3498db", // blue
server.ts:  "#9b59b6", // purple
server.ts:  "#f1c40f", // yellow
server.ts:  "#e74c3c", // red
server.ts:  "#1abc9c", // turquoise
server.ts:  "#fd79a8", // pink
server.ts:  "#ffeaa7", // warm yellow
server.ts:  "#a8e6cf", // mint
server.ts:];
server.ts:
server.ts:function getRandomColor() {
server.ts:  return PLAYER_COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random() * PLAYER_COLORS.length)];
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:// Websocket logic
server.ts:wss.on("connection", (ws: WebSocket) => {
server.ts:  let connectedPlayerId: string | null = null;
server.ts:
server.ts:  ws.on("message", (message: string) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const event = JSON.parse(message);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      switch (event.type) {
server.ts:        case "register": {
server.ts:          const { id, name, clan, coins, clicks, color, telegramId, autoClickerLevel, email, whitelistApproved } = event.data;
server.ts:          
server.ts:          const proceedRegistration = () => {
server.ts:            // If the socket was previously attached to a different ID (like a guest ID), remove it to prevent duplicates
server.ts:            if (connectedPlayerId && connectedPlayerId !== id) {
server.ts:              players.delete(connectedPlayerId);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            connectedPlayerId = id;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Tag socket for connection checks
server.ts:            (ws as any).playerId = id;
server.ts:            (ws as any).clan = clan || null;
server.ts:            (ws as any).telegramId = telegramId || null;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            const existingColor = players.get(id)?.color || color || getRandomColor();
server.ts:            
server.ts:            players.set(id, {
server.ts:              id,
server.ts:              name: name || "Игрок",
server.ts:              clan: clan || null,
server.ts:              coins: typeof coins === "number" ? coins : 0,
server.ts:              clicks: typeof clicks === "number" ? clicks : 0,
server.ts:              color: existingColor,
server.ts:              lastSeen: Date.now(),
server.ts:              isOnline: true,
server.ts:              telegramId: telegramId || null,
server.ts:              autoClickerLevel: typeof autoClickerLevel === "number" ? autoClickerLevel : 0,
server.ts:              email: email || null,
server.ts:              voiceSettings: players.get(id)?.voiceSettings || {
server.ts:                globalAllowed: true,
server.ts:                disabledVoiceSenders: []
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            });
server.ts:
server.ts:            // Log in Google Sheets if applicable
server.ts:            if (telegramId) {
server.ts:              const matchedPlayer = findSyncPlayerByTelegram(telegramId);
server.ts:              if (matchedPlayer && matchedPlayer.sheetId) {
server.ts:                appendToGoogleSheet(matchedPlayer.sheetId, [id, name, coins, clicks, new Date().toISOString()]);
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            // Send initial state: entire active player list and chat history and clan wars info
server.ts:            ws.send(JSON.stringify({
server.ts:              type: "init",
server.ts:              data: {
server.ts:                players: Array.from(players.values()).filter(p => p.isOnline),
server.ts:                chatHistory: chatMessages,
server.ts:                assignedColor: existingColor,
server.ts:                clanPrivacy: getClansPrivacyList(),
server.ts:                clanWarState: clanWarState,
server.ts:                marketplaceListings: currentMarketplaceListings,
server.ts:                instanceId: SERVER_INSTANCE_ID,
server.ts:              },
server.ts:            }));
server.ts:
server.ts:            // Notify everyone about the updated list
server.ts:            broadcastPlayers();
server.ts:          };
server.ts:
server.ts:          // Google Sheets Whitelist Verification
server.ts:          if (masterSheetId && !whitelistApproved) {
server.ts:            getGoogleSheetValues(masterSheetId, 'Sheet1!A1:Z550').then((values) => {
server.ts:              if (values) {
server.ts:                const flatValues = values.flat().filter(Boolean).map(v => String(v).trim().toLowerCase());
server.ts:                
server.ts:                // Whitelist terms to search
server.ts:                const termsToCheck = [
server.ts:                  id,
server.ts:                  telegramId ? String(telegramId).trim() : null,
server.ts:                  email ? String(email).trim().toLowerCase() : null,
server.ts:                  name ? String(name).trim().toLowerCase() : null
server.ts:                ].filter(Boolean) as string[];
server.ts:
server.ts:                // If any of the user's details matches any value (or substring) in the sheet's raw values, allow them!
server.ts:                const isWhitelisted = flatValues.some((cellVal) => {
server.ts:                  return termsToCheck.some(term => {
server.ts:                    return cellVal === term || cellVal.includes(term) || term.includes(cellVal);
server.ts:                  });
server.ts:                });
server.ts:
server.ts:                if (!isWhitelisted) {
server.ts:                  console.log(`Whitelist REJECTED for User: ${name} (ID: ${id}, TgID: ${telegramId}, Email: ${email})`);
server.ts:                  ws.send(JSON.stringify({
server.ts:                    type: "whitelist_rejected",
server.ts:                    data: { message: "Доступ ограничен! Вы не добавлены в белый список (Google Таблица)." }
server.ts:                  }));
server.ts:                  return;
server.ts:                }
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              proceedRegistration();
server.ts:            }).catch((err) => {
server.ts:              console.error("Whitelist check failed due to error, permitting player by fallback:", err);
server.ts:              proceedRegistration();
server.ts:            });
server.ts:          } else {
server.ts:            proceedRegistration();
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          break;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        case "status_update": {
server.ts:          const { id, name, clan, coins, clicks, telegramId, autoClickerLevel } = event.data;
server.ts:          const player = players.get(id);
server.ts:          if (player) {
server.ts:            player.name = name || player.name;
server.ts:            player.clan = clan || null;
server.ts:            player.coins = typeof coins === "number" ? coins : player.coins;
server.ts:            player.clicks = typeof clicks === "number" ? clicks : player.clicks;
server.ts:            player.lastSeen = Date.now();
server.ts:            player.telegramId = telegramId || player.telegramId;
server.ts:            if (typeof autoClickerLevel === "number") {
server.ts:              player.autoClickerLevel = autoClickerLevel;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            players.set(id, player);
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Keep socket properties in sync
server.ts:            if (id === connectedPlayerId) {
server.ts:              (ws as any).clan = clan || null;
server.ts:              (ws as any).telegramId = telegramId || (ws as any).telegramId;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Broadcast changes
server.ts:            broadcastPlayers();
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          break;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        case "click_action": {
server.ts:          // A player clicked! Let's broadcast a small visual click effect event to make it feel super interactive
server.ts:          const { id, power } = event.data;
server.ts:          const player = players.get(id);
server.ts:          if (player) {
server.ts:            player.clicks += 1;
server.ts:            player.coins += power;
server.ts:            player.lastSeen = Date.now();
server.ts:            players.set(id, player);
server.ts:
server.ts:            broadcast({
server.ts:              type: "player_clicked",
server.ts:              data: {
server.ts:                id,
server.ts:                name: player.name,
server.ts:                clan: player.clan,
server.ts:                power,
server.ts:                color: player.color,
server.ts:                timestamp: Date.now(),
server.ts:              },
server.ts:            });
server.ts:
server.ts:            // Periodically broadcast the aggregated players update to ensure counts match
server.ts:            broadcastPlayers();
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          break;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        case "clan_war_click": {
server.ts:          const { playerId, pointsContribution } = event.data;
server.ts:          const p = players.get(playerId);
server.ts:          if (p && p.clan && clanWarState.isWarActive) {
server.ts:            if (!clanWarState.clansWarPoints[p.clan]) {
server.ts:              clanWarState.clansWarPoints[p.clan] = 0;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            clanWarState.clansWarPoints[p.clan] += (pointsContribution || 1);
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Reward some coins for active participation in clan wars!
server.ts:            p.coins += (pointsContribution || 1);
server.ts:            p.clicks += 1;
server.ts:            players.set(playerId, p);
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Save to Cloud Firestore so progress matches instantly and doesn't get lost
server.ts:            getAuthenticatedDb().then((dbInstance) => {
server.ts:              const userRef = doc(dbInstance, "users", playerId);
server.ts:              updateDoc(userRef, {
server.ts:                coins: p.coins,
server.ts:                totalClicks: p.clicks,
server.ts:                updatedAt: new Date()
server.ts:              }).catch((err) => {
server.ts:                console.error(`[War Click Doc Fail] Could not update user ${playerId} doc:`, err);
server.ts:              });
server.ts:            }).catch((err) => {
server.ts:              console.error("[War Click DB Fail] Could not obtain DB instance:", err);
server.ts:            });
server.ts:
server.ts:            broadcastPlayers();
server.ts:            broadcastClanWarState();
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          break;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        case "clan_war_boost_simulation": {
server.ts:          const { clanName, amount } = event.data;
server.ts:          if (clanName) {
server.ts:            clProductionSimBoost[clanName] = (clProductionSimBoost[clanName] || 0) + (amount || 5);
server.ts:            broadcastClanWarState();
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          break;
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        case "chat_msg": {
server.ts:          const { playerId: senderId, text, isClanOnly, voiceData, voiceDuration } = event.data;
server.ts:          const player = players.get(senderId);
server.ts:          if (player && ((text && text.trim()) || voiceData)) {
server.ts:            // Check time restriction if sending voice to global lobby

server.ts:function isHourInInterval(hour: number, start: number, end: number) {
server.ts:  if (start <= end) {
server.ts:    return hour >= start && hour < end;
server.ts:  } else {
server.ts:    return hour >= start || hour < end;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}

server.ts:// Verification helper for Telegram Mini App initData
server.ts:function verifyTelegramWebappSignature(token: string, initData: string): boolean {
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const params = new URLSearchParams(initData);
server.ts:    const hash = params.get("hash");
server.ts:    if (!hash) return false;
server.ts:
server.ts:    const keys = Array.from(params.keys())
server.ts:      .filter((k) => k !== "hash")
server.ts:      .sort();
server.ts:
server.ts:    const dataCheckString = keys.map((key) => `${key}=${params.get(key)}`).join("\n");
server.ts:
server.ts:    const secretKey = crypto
server.ts:      .createHmac("sha256", "WebAppData")
server.ts:      .update(token)
server.ts:      .digest();
server.ts:
server.ts:    const actualHash = crypto
server.ts:      .createHmac("sha256", secretKey)
server.ts:      .update(dataCheckString)
server.ts:      .digest("hex");
server.ts:
server.ts:    return actualHash === hash;
server.ts:  } catch (error) {
server.ts:    console.error("Error in verifyTelegramWebappSignature:", error);
server.ts:    return false;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:// Verification helper for Telegram Login Widget
server.ts:function verifyTelegramWidgetSignature(token: string, user: any): boolean {
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const hash = user.hash;
server.ts:    if (!hash) return false;
server.ts:
server.ts:    const dataCheckArr: string[] = [];
server.ts:    const keys = Object.keys(user).filter((k) => k !== "hash").sort();
server.ts:    for (const key of keys) {
server.ts:      if (user[key] !== undefined && user[key] !== null) {
server.ts:        dataCheckArr.push(`${key}=${user[key]}`);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    const dataCheckString = dataCheckArr.join("\n");
server.ts:
server.ts:    const secretKey = crypto.createHash("sha256").update(token).digest();
server.ts:
server.ts:    const actualHash = crypto
server.ts:      .createHmac("sha256", secretKey)
server.ts:      .update(dataCheckString)
server.ts:      .digest("hex");
server.ts:
server.ts:    return actualHash === hash;
server.ts:  } catch (error) {
server.ts:    console.error("Error in verifyTelegramWidgetSignature:", error);
server.ts:    return false;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:interface BotChatState {
server.ts:  lastBotMessageId?: number;
server.ts:  sentMessageIds?: number[];
server.ts:  lastNotificationText?: string;
server.ts:  supportMode?: boolean;
server.ts:  supportDraft?: string[];
server.ts:  keyboardPage?: number;
server.ts:}
server.ts:const botChatStates = new Map<number, BotChatState>();
server.ts:
server.ts:async function getBotChatState(chatId: number): Promise<BotChatState> {
server.ts:  let state = botChatStates.get(chatId);
server.ts:  if (state) {
server.ts:    if (!state.sentMessageIds || !Array.isArray(state.sentMessageIds)) {
server.ts:      state.sentMessageIds = [];
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    return state;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const dbInstance = await getAuthenticatedDb();
server.ts:    if (dbInstance) {
server.ts:      const docRef = doc(dbInstance, "bot_chat_states", String(chatId));
server.ts:      const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef);
server.ts:      if (docSnap.exists()) {
server.ts:        const data = docSnap.data() as BotChatState;
server.ts:        if (!data.sentMessageIds || !Array.isArray(data.sentMessageIds)) {
server.ts:          data.sentMessageIds = [];
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        botChatStates.set(chatId, data);
server.ts:        return data;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (err) {
server.ts:    console.error("Error loading bot chat state from Firestore:", err);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  const newState: BotChatState = { sentMessageIds: [] };
server.ts:  botChatStates.set(chatId, newState);
server.ts:  return newState;
server.ts:}

server.ts:    const dbInstance = await getAuthenticatedDb();
server.ts:    if (dbInstance) {
server.ts:      const docRef = doc(dbInstance, "bot_chat_states", String(chatId));
server.ts:      await setDoc(docRef, state, { merge: true });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (err) {
server.ts:    console.error("Error saving bot chat state to Firestore:", err);
server.ts:  }

server.ts:async function deleteMessageSafe(chatId: number, messageId: number) {
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    await fetch(`https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/deleteMessage`, {
server.ts:      method: "POST",
server.ts:      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
server.ts:      body: JSON.stringify({
server.ts:        chat_id: chatId,
server.ts:        message_id: messageId
server.ts:      })
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    // Remove from in-memory tracking as well
server.ts:    const state = await getBotChatState(chatId);
server.ts:    if (state) {
server.ts:      let changed = false;
server.ts:      if (state.sentMessageIds && state.sentMessageIds.includes(messageId)) {
server.ts:        state.sentMessageIds = state.sentMessageIds.filter(id => id !== messageId);
server.ts:        changed = true;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      if (state.lastBotMessageId === messageId) {
server.ts:        delete state.lastBotMessageId;
server.ts:        changed = true;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      if (changed) {
server.ts:        await saveBotChatState(chatId, state);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (err) {
server.ts:    // Ignore errors from missing permission or message already deleted
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:async function sendCleanBotMessage(chatId: number, text: string, options: any = {}): Promise<any> {
server.ts:  const state = await getBotChatState(chatId);
server.ts:  if (!state.sentMessageIds) {
server.ts:    state.sentMessageIds = [];
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Auto clean up old single message if we are not keeping history info
server.ts:  if (state.lastBotMessageId && !options.keepHistory) {
server.ts:    await deleteMessageSafe(chatId, state.lastBotMessageId);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Cache notification content if it contains transaction details, message texts, etc.
server.ts:  const isNotification = !!(options.keepHistory || text.includes("Сохранено") || text.includes("уведомление") || text.includes("сообщение") || text.includes("Прогресс"));
server.ts:  if (isNotification) {
server.ts:    state.lastNotificationText = text;
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Default to standard main menu keyboard if no customized reply_markup is passed in
server.ts:  let finalReplyMarkup = options.reply_markup;
server.ts:  if (finalReplyMarkup === undefined || finalReplyMarkup === DEFAULT_KEYBOARD) {
server.ts:    const page = state.keyboardPage || 1;
server.ts:    finalReplyMarkup = getKeyboardForUser(chatId, page);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const res = await fetch(`https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage`, {
server.ts:      method: "POST",
server.ts:      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
server.ts:      body: JSON.stringify({
server.ts:        chat_id: chatId,
server.ts:        text,
server.ts:        parse_mode: options.parse_mode || "Markdown",
server.ts:        reply_markup: finalReplyMarkup,
server.ts:        ...options
server.ts:      })
server.ts:    });
server.ts:    const json = await res.json();
server.ts:    if (json && json.ok && json.result) {
server.ts:      const messageId = json.result.message_id;
server.ts:      if (!options.keepHistory) {
server.ts:        state.lastBotMessageId = messageId;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      if (!state.sentMessageIds.includes(messageId)) {
server.ts:        state.sentMessageIds.push(messageId);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      await saveBotChatState(chatId, state);
server.ts:      return json;
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (err) {
server.ts:    console.error("Error sending clean bot message:", err);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  return null;
server.ts:}

server.ts:  one_time: false,
server.ts:  buttons: [
server.ts:    [{ action: { type: "text", label: "🎮 Играть!" }, color: "positive" }]
server.ts:  ]
server.ts:});

server.ts:    params.set("access_token", VK_BOT_TOKEN);
server.ts:    params.set("v", "5.199");
server.ts:    const resp = await fetch("https://api.vk.com/method/messages.send", { method: "POST", body: params });
server.ts:    const data = await resp.json();
server.ts:    console.log("VK response:", JSON.stringify(data));
server.ts:  } catch(e) {
server.ts:    console.error("VK msg error", e);

server.ts:async function startVkBotPolling() {
server.ts:  if (!VK_BOT_TOKEN || !VK_GROUP_ID) return;
server.ts:  console.log("Starting VK Bot Polling loop...");
server.ts:
server.ts:  let vkLongPollVars = { server: "", key: "", ts: "" };
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const res = await fetch(`https://api.vk.com/method/groups.getLongPollServer?group_id=${VK_GROUP_ID}&access_token=${VK_BOT_TOKEN}&v=5.199`);
server.ts:    const data = await res.json();
server.ts:    if (data.response) vkLongPollVars = data.response;
server.ts:  } catch(e) {}
server.ts:
server.ts:  while (true) {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      if (!vkLongPollVars.server) {
server.ts:        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 5000));
server.ts:        continue;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      const response = await fetch(`${vkLongPollVars.server}?act=a_check&key=${vkLongPollVars.key}&ts=${vkLongPollVars.ts}&wait=25`);
server.ts:      const data = await response.json();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (data.failed) {
server.ts:        const res = await fetch(`https://api.vk.com/method/groups.getLongPollServer?group_id=${VK_GROUP_ID}&access_token=${VK_BOT_TOKEN}&v=5.199`);
server.ts:        const initData = await res.json();
server.ts:        if (initData.response) vkLongPollVars = initData.response;
server.ts:        continue;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      vkLongPollVars.ts = data.ts;
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (data.updates && data.updates.length > 0) {
server.ts:        for (const update of data.updates) {
server.ts:          if (update.type === "message_new" && update.object && update.object.message) {
server.ts:            const msg = update.object.message;
server.ts:            const peer_id = msg.peer_id;
server.ts:            const text = (msg.text || "").trim();
server.ts:            const from_id = msg.from_id;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            let mappedText = text;
server.ts:            if (text === "🎮 Играть!") mappedText = "/play";
server.ts:            else if (text === "👤 Мой Профиль") mappedText = "/profile";
server.ts:            else if (text === "🔑 Код для входа") mappedText = "/code";
server.ts:            else if (text === "🔔 Последнее уведомление") mappedText = "/last_notification";
server.ts:            else if (text === "💾 Сохранить прогресс") mappedText = "/save";
server.ts:            else if (text === "🧹 Очистить чат") mappedText = "/clear_chat";
server.ts:            else if (text === "💬 Поддержка") mappedText = "/support";
server.ts:            else if (text === "❓ Справка") mappedText = "/aide";
server.ts:            else if (text === "📊 Таблица" || text.toLowerCase() === "таблица") mappedText = "/table";
server.ts:
server.ts:            const upperMappedText = mappedText.toUpperCase();
server.ts:            let potentialCode = "";
server.ts:            if (upperMappedText.length === 6 && /^[A-Z0-9]{6}$/.test(upperMappedText)) {
server.ts:              potentialCode = upperMappedText;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (potentialCode) {
server.ts:              if (pendingClientCodes.has(potentialCode)) {
server.ts:                const codeData = pendingClientCodes.get(potentialCode)!;
server.ts:                codeData.telegramUser = { id: String(from_id), username: `vk_${from_id}`, first_name: "VK", last_name: "Игрок" };
server.ts:                codeData.resolved = true;
server.ts:                await sendVkMessage(peer_id, "⏳ Секунду...");
server.ts:                await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 5000));
server.ts:                
server.ts:                let statsLine = "";
server.ts:                Array.from(players.values()).forEach((p) => {
server.ts:                  if (p.telegramId === String(from_id) || p.username === `vk_${from_id}`) {

server.ts:                  }
server.ts:                });
server.ts:                await sendVkMessage(peer_id, `ура вы подключены, теперь у вас доступ к уведомлениям! 🎮\n\n${statsLine}✨ Ваш игровой профиль успешно синхронизирован!`);
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            } else if (mappedText.toLowerCase() === "/code" || mappedText.toLowerCase() === "войти" || mappedText.toLowerCase() === "login" || mappedText.toLowerCase() === "начать") {
server.ts:              const characters = "ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789";
server.ts:              let code = "";
server.ts:              for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) code += characters.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * characters.length));
server.ts:              verificationCodes.set(code, {
server.ts:                id: String(from_id),
server.ts:                username: `vk_${from_id}`,
server.ts:                first_name: "Игрок",

server.ts:                photo_url: "",

server.ts:              });

server.ts:              await sendVkMessage(peer_id, codeMessage);
server.ts:            } else if (mappedText.toLowerCase() === "/play") {
server.ts:              const inlineKbd = JSON.stringify({
server.ts:                inline: true,

server.ts:              });
server.ts:              await sendVkMessage(peer_id, "🎮 *Погнали играть!*\n\nЗапускай игру прямо сейчас по ссылке:", { keyboard: inlineKbd });
server.ts:            } else if (mappedText.toLowerCase() === "/clear_chat") {
server.ts:              await sendVkMessage(peer_id, "🧹 *История чата очищена (визуально для бота)!*");
server.ts:            } else if (mappedText.toLowerCase() === "/table" || mappedText.toLowerCase() === "/sheet" || mappedText.toLowerCase() === "таблица") {
server.ts:              if (masterSheetId) {
server.ts:                let sheetTabs: string[] = [];
