server.ts:                    scopes: ['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets.readonly'],
server.ts:                  });
server.ts:                  const authClient = await auth.getClient();
server.ts:                  const sheets = google.sheets({ version: 'v4', auth: authClient as any });
server.ts:                  const sheetMeta = await sheets.spreadsheets.get({ spreadsheetId: masterSheetId });
server.ts:                  sheetTabs = sheetMeta.data.sheets?.map(s => s.properties?.title || '').filter(Boolean) || [];
server.ts:                } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:                  console.error("Failed to fetch sheet tabs in VK:", e.message || e);
server.ts:                }
server.ts:
server.ts:                const sheetLink = `https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/${masterSheetId}/edit`;
server.ts:                let tabMsg = "";
server.ts:                if (sheetTabs.length > 0) {
server.ts:                  tabMsg = "\n\n📂 Доступные листы (вкладки по годам):\n" + sheetTabs.map(tab => `• 📅 ${tab} год`).join("\n");
server.ts:                }
server.ts:                await sendVkMessage(peer_id, `📊 *Google Таблицы*\n\nПерейдите по ссылке ниже, чтобы просмотреть таблицу по годам или заполнить её вручную:${tabMsg}\n\n👉 ${sheetLink}`);
server.ts:              } else {
server.ts:                await sendVkMessage(peer_id, "⚠️ Google Таблица еще не подключена администратором.");
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            // Убираем фоллбэк (else). Если сервер не узнал команду, он просто промолчит,
server.ts:            // а сообщение подхватит и обработает VK CXhub (например, FAQ или воронка).
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    } catch(e) {
server.ts:      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000));
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:let lastUpdateId = 0;
server.ts:const processedUpdateIdsInMemory = new Set<number>();
server.ts:
server.ts:async function startTelegramBotPolling() {
server.ts:  console.log("Starting Telegram Bot Polling loop...");
server.ts:
server.ts:  // Prevent multiple active bot polling loops by using a PID lock file
server.ts:  const PID_FILE = "/tmp/telegram_bot_polling.pid";
server.ts:  const currentPid = process.pid;
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    if (fs.existsSync(PID_FILE)) {
server.ts:      const oldPidStr = fs.readFileSync(PID_FILE, "utf8").trim();
server.ts:      const oldPid = parseInt(oldPidStr, 10);
server.ts:      if (oldPid && oldPid !== currentPid) {
server.ts:        console.log(`Killing old bot polling process: ${oldPid}`);
server.ts:        try {
server.ts:          process.kill(oldPid, "SIGTERM");
server.ts:          // Give it a tiny bit of time to release resources
server.ts:          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500));
server.ts:        } catch (err) {
server.ts:          // Process might already be dead or belong to a different user, ignore safely
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (err) {
server.ts:    console.error("Error managing bot lock file:", err);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    fs.writeFileSync(PID_FILE, String(currentPid), "utf8");
server.ts:  } catch (err) {
server.ts:    console.error("Error writing bot PID file:", err);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:  
server.ts:  // Skip over old historical messages sent while the bot was offline or during a server restart
server.ts:  try {
server.ts:    const initRes = await fetch(`https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/getUpdates?offset=-1&limit=1`);
server.ts:    const initData = await initRes.json();
server.ts:    if (initData && initData.ok && Array.isArray(initData.result) && initData.result.length > 0) {
server.ts:      lastUpdateId = initData.result[0].update_id;
server.ts:      console.log(`Telegram polling initialized. Skipping historical messages. lastUpdateId set to: ${lastUpdateId}`);
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  } catch (e) {
server.ts:    console.error("Failed to initialize lastUpdateId for Telegram bot skipping:", e);
server.ts:  }
server.ts:
server.ts:  while (true) {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const controller = new AbortController();
server.ts:      const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 20000); // 20 second timeout
server.ts:      const response = await fetch(`https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/getUpdates?offset=${lastUpdateId + 1}&timeout=15`, {
server.ts:        signal: controller.signal
server.ts:      });
server.ts:      clearTimeout(timeout);
server.ts:      const data = await response.json();
server.ts:      if (data && data.ok && Array.isArray(data.result)) {
server.ts:        for (const update of data.result) {
server.ts:          lastUpdateId = update.update_id;
server.ts:
server.ts:          // In-memory instant deduplication of Telegram updates to prevent double-processing
server.ts:          if (processedUpdateIdsInMemory.has(update.update_id)) {
server.ts:            continue;
server.ts:          }
server.ts:          processedUpdateIdsInMemory.add(update.update_id);
server.ts:          // Prevent memory leaks by keeping the set history capped to latest 2000 items
server.ts:          if (processedUpdateIdsInMemory.size > 2000) {
server.ts:            const oldest = processedUpdateIdsInMemory.values().next().value;
server.ts:            if (oldest !== undefined) {
server.ts:              processedUpdateIdsInMemory.delete(oldest);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          try {
server.ts:            const dbInstance = await getAuthenticatedDb();
server.ts:            const lockRef = doc(dbInstance, "bot_locks", String(update.update_id));
server.ts:            const isProcessed = await runTransaction(dbInstance, async (transaction) => {
server.ts:              const lockDoc = await transaction.get(lockRef);
server.ts:              if (lockDoc.exists()) {
server.ts:                return true;
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              transaction.set(lockRef, { processedAt: Date.now() });
server.ts:              return false;
server.ts:            });
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (isProcessed) {
server.ts:              continue;
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          } catch (lockErr) {
server.ts:            console.error("Lock error:", lockErr);
server.ts:          }
server.ts:
server.ts:          // Handle inline button Callback Queries (button click events)
server.ts:          if (update.callback_query) {
server.ts:            const callbackQuery = update.callback_query;
server.ts:            const callbackData = callbackQuery.data;
server.ts:            const chatId = callbackQuery.message?.chat?.id;
server.ts:            const messageId = callbackQuery.message?.message_id;
server.ts:
server.ts:            // Stop the loading spinner in the user's Telegram client right away
server.ts:            await fetch(`https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/answerCallbackQuery`, {
server.ts:              method: "POST",
server.ts:              headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
server.ts:              body: JSON.stringify({ callback_query_id: callbackQuery.id })
server.ts:            }).catch(() => {});
server.ts:
server.ts:            if (chatId && messageId) {
server.ts:              if (callbackData === "delete_this") {
server.ts:                await deleteMessageSafe(chatId, messageId);
server.ts:              } else if (callbackData === "delete_all") {
server.ts:                const state = await getBotChatState(chatId);
server.ts:                if (state && state.sentMessageIds) {

server.ts:              if (mappedText.startsWith("/add ")) {

server.ts:                  let searchLower = targetSearch.toLowerCase();
server.ts:                  if (searchLower.startsWith("@")) {
server.ts:                    searchLower = searchLower.substring(1);
server.ts:                  }

server.ts:                  for (const p of players.values()) {

server.ts:                      matchedPlayer = p;
server.ts:                      break;
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:                  
server.ts:                  if (!matchedPlayer) {

server.ts:                  } else {
server.ts:                    const dbTgId = matchedPlayer.telegramId ? String(matchedPlayer.telegramId).trim() : "";

server.ts:                    const dbPlayerName = matchedPlayer.name || "Игрок";
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    // Access rules check: Admins can add anyone, players can only add themselves.
server.ts:                    const isSelf = dbTgId === senderId || 
server.ts:                                   (from.username && matchedPlayer.username && String(matchedPlayer.username).toLowerCase() === String(from.username).toLowerCase()) ||
server.ts:                                   (from.first_name && matchedPlayer.name && String(matchedPlayer.name).toLowerCase() === String(from.first_name).toLowerCase());
server.ts:                    
server.ts:                    if (!isSelf && !isStaffUser) {
server.ts:                      await sendCleanBotMessage(chatId, "⚠️ Вы можете добавлять в таблицу только собственный игровой профиль! Добавление других игроков в таблицу доступно только администраторам и модераторам.");

server.ts:                    } else {
server.ts:                      // Attempt to write/append to sheet

server.ts:                      const recordClicks = matchedPlayer.clicks || 0;
server.ts:

server.ts:                          recordClicks
server.ts:                        ]);

server.ts:                      }
server.ts:                    }
server.ts:                  }
server.ts:                } catch (e: any) {
server.ts:                  console.error("Firestore user search error in telegram bot lookup handler:", e);
server.ts:                  await sendCleanBotMessage(chatId, "❌ Внутренняя ошибка поиска профиля в базе данных.");
server.ts:                }
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            } else {
server.ts:              // Standard fallback explanation info
server.ts:              const welcomeName = from.first_name || "Игрок";
server.ts:              const userTgId = String(from.id);
server.ts:              const fallbackMsg = `👋 *Привет, ${welcomeName}!* \n\n📌 Ваш Telegram ID: \`${userTgId}\` *(нажмите, чтобы скопировать)*\n\nЧтобы связать свой игровой аккаунт и включить уведомления, пожалуйста, откройте игру на сайте и нажмите кнопку **«Подключить Telegram»**!\n\n💾 Отправьте /save, чтобы вручную сохранить прогресс и проверить актуальный баланс.\n📋 Или напишите ваше *имя* или *логин*, чтобы занести ваши данные в общую Google Таблицу!`;
server.ts:              await sendCleanBotMessage(chatId, fallbackMsg);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:    } catch (err) {
server.ts:      console.error("Error in Telegram Bot long polling:", err);
server.ts:      // Delay retry on failure to avoid hitting limits
server.ts:      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 5000));
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    // Small sleep between polls
server.ts:    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
server.ts:  }
server.ts:}
server.ts:
server.ts:// Static files / Vite entry points
server.ts:async function start() {
server.ts:  // API Telegram Auth Endpoint
server.ts:  app.post("/api/telegram-auth", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { initData, widgetData } = req.body;
server.ts:      let telegramUser: any = null;
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (initData) {
server.ts:        const isValid = verifyTelegramWebappSignature(TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, initData);
server.ts:        if (!isValid) {
server.ts:          return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: "Invalid signature" });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const params = new URLSearchParams(initData);
server.ts:        const userJson = params.get("user");
server.ts:        if (userJson) {
server.ts:          telegramUser = JSON.parse(userJson);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      } else if (widgetData) {
server.ts:        const isValid = verifyTelegramWidgetSignature(TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, widgetData);
server.ts:        if (!isValid) {
server.ts:          return res.status(401).json({ success: false, error: "Invalid signature" });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        telegramUser = widgetData;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!telegramUser || !telegramUser.id) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: "Missing user identity" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const telegramId = String(telegramUser.id);
server.ts:      const username = telegramUser.username || "";
server.ts:      const firstName = telegramUser.first_name || "";
server.ts:      const lastName = telegramUser.last_name || "";
server.ts:      const fullName = [firstName, lastName].filter(Boolean).join(" ") || `Telegram Player ${telegramId}`;
server.ts:      const photoUrl = telegramUser.photo_url || "";
server.ts:
server.ts:      const uid = `telegram_${telegramId}`;
server.ts:      const email = `tg_${telegramId}@telegram-auth.game`;
server.ts:      const securePassword = crypto
server.ts:        .createHmac("sha256", TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN)
server.ts:        .update(telegramId)
server.ts:        .digest("hex");
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({
server.ts:        success: true,
server.ts:        email: email,
server.ts:        password: securePassword,
server.ts:        displayName: fullName,
server.ts:        photoURL: photoUrl,
server.ts:        user: {
server.ts:          uid: uid,
server.ts:          id: telegramId,
server.ts:          username: username,
server.ts:          displayName: fullName,
server.ts:          photoURL: photoUrl
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Telegram auth API failure:", err);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: err.message || "Internal server error" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // API Telegram Notify Save Endpoint (respects user status)
server.ts:  app.post("/api/telegram-notify-save", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { telegramId, playerName, coins, notificationsEnabled } = req.body;
server.ts:      if (!telegramId) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: "Missing telegramId" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // If notifications explicitly disabled, do not send messages to prevent annoyance
server.ts:      if (notificationsEnabled === false) {
server.ts:        return res.json({ success: true, message: "Notifications are disabled by user." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const msg = `✅ *Ваш прогресс успешно синхронизирован!* 💾\n\n👤 Игрок: *${playerName || "Игрок"}*\n💰 Баланс: *${Math.floor(coins || 0).toLocaleString()}* монет\n\n🟢 *Вы подтверждены! Удачной игры!* 🎮`;
server.ts:
server.ts:      await sendCleanBotMessage(Number(telegramId), msg, {
server.ts:        keepHistory: true,
server.ts:        reply_markup: {
server.ts:          inline_keyboard: [
server.ts:            [
server.ts:              { text: "❌ Удалить это сообщение", callback_data: "delete_this" },
server.ts:              { text: "🧹 Удалить все уведомления", callback_data: "delete_all" }
server.ts:            ]
server.ts:          ]
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Failed to send save notification over telegram:", err);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: err.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  // API Telegram Toggle Notifications
server.ts:  app.post("/api/telegram-toggle-notifications", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { telegramId, enabled, playerName } = req.body;
server.ts:      if (!telegramId) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: "Missing telegramId" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const chatIdNum = Number(telegramId);
server.ts:      if (enabled) {

server.ts:        await sendCleanBotMessage(chatIdNum, msg, {

server.ts:          reply_markup: {
server.ts:            inline_keyboard: [
server.ts:              [
server.ts:                { text: "❌ Удалить это сообщение", callback_data: "delete_this" },
server.ts:                { text: "🧹 Удалить все уведомления", callback_data: "delete_all" }
server.ts:              ]
server.ts:            ]
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        const msg = `🔕 *Уведомления от бота отключены.* \n\nВы всегда можете включить их в настройках игры в любой момент.`;
server.ts:        await sendCleanBotMessage(chatIdNum, msg, {
server.ts:          keepHistory: true,
server.ts:          reply_markup: {
server.ts:            inline_keyboard: [
server.ts:              [
server.ts:                { text: "❌ Удалить это сообщение", callback_data: "delete_this" },
server.ts:                { text: "🧹 Удалить все уведомления", callback_data: "delete_all" }
server.ts:              ]
server.ts:            ]
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Failed to toggle notifications:", err);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: err.message });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:      const { chatId, message } = req.body;
server.ts:      if (!chatId || !message) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: "Missing parameters" });
server.ts:      }

server.ts:  // API Telegram Verification Code Login Endpoint
server.ts:  app.post("/api/telegram-code-login", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { code } = req.body;
server.ts:      if (!code || typeof code !== "string") {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: "Код авторизации обязателен." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const cleanCode = code.trim().toUpperCase();
server.ts:      const codeData = verificationCodes.get(cleanCode);
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!codeData) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: "Неверный или истекший код авторизации." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // 10 minutes expiry check
server.ts:      if (Date.now() - codeData.createdAt > 10 * 60 * 1000) {
server.ts:        verificationCodes.delete(cleanCode);
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: "Срок действия кода истек." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Consume valid code after a 30 second grace period to allow client retry cushion
server.ts:      setTimeout(() => {
server.ts:        verificationCodes.delete(cleanCode);
server.ts:      }, 30000);
server.ts:
server.ts:      const telegramId = codeData.id;
server.ts:      const username = codeData.username;
server.ts:      const uid = `telegram_${telegramId}`;
server.ts:      const fullName = [codeData.first_name, codeData.last_name].filter(Boolean).join(" ") || `Telegram Player ${telegramId}`;
server.ts:
server.ts:      const email = `tg_${telegramId}@telegram-auth.game`;
server.ts:      const securePassword = crypto
server.ts:        .createHmac("sha256", TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN)
server.ts:        .update(telegramId)
server.ts:        .digest("hex");
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({
server.ts:        success: true,
server.ts:        email: email,
server.ts:        password: securePassword,
server.ts:        displayName: fullName,
server.ts:        photoURL: "",
server.ts:        user: {
server.ts:          uid: uid,
server.ts:          id: telegramId,
server.ts:          username: username,
server.ts:          displayName: fullName,
server.ts:          photoURL: ""
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Telegram verification code login API failure:", err);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: err.message || "Ошибка сервера" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/log-trade", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { buyerId, sellerId, itemTitle, price } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const dbInstance = await getAuthenticatedDb();
server.ts:      // Get seller sheet ID
server.ts:      const sellerDoc = await getDoc(doc(dbInstance, "users", sellerId));
server.ts:      if (sellerDoc.exists()) {
server.ts:        const sellerSheetId = sellerDoc.data().sheetId;

server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Get buyer sheet ID
server.ts:      const buyerDoc = await getDoc(doc(dbInstance, "users", buyerId));
server.ts:      if (buyerDoc.exists()) {
server.ts:        const buyerSheetId = buyerDoc.data().sheetId;
server.ts:        if (buyerSheetId) {
server.ts:          await appendToGoogleSheet(buyerSheetId, [new Date().toISOString(), "Purchase", itemTitle, price, sellerId]);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Trade logging error:", error);

server.ts:
server.ts:  // API to generate a login code for the game client
server.ts:  app.get("/api/telegram-login-code", (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const characters = "ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ23456789";
server.ts:      let code = "";
server.ts:      for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
server.ts:        code += characters.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * characters.length));
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      pendingClientCodes.set(code, {
server.ts:        code,
server.ts:        resolved: false,
server.ts:        createdAt: Date.now()
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Clean up old codes (>10 min)
server.ts:      const now = Date.now();
server.ts:      pendingClientCodes.forEach((val, key) => {
server.ts:        if (now - val.createdAt > 10 * 60 * 1000) {
server.ts:          pendingClientCodes.delete(key);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, code });
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Failed to generate login code:", err);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: err.message || "Internal server error" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  // API to poll and check if a user sent this code to the TG bot
server.ts:  app.get("/api/telegram-login-poll", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { code } = req.query;
server.ts:      if (!code || typeof code !== "string") {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ success: false, error: "Код обязателен." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const upperCode = code.trim().toUpperCase();
server.ts:      const codeData = pendingClientCodes.get(upperCode);
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!codeData) {
server.ts:        return res.json({ success: true, resolved: false, error: "Код не найден или истек." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Check expiry (10 min)
server.ts:      if (Date.now() - codeData.createdAt > 10 * 60 * 1000) {
server.ts:        pendingClientCodes.delete(upperCode);
server.ts:        return res.json({ success: true, resolved: false, error: "Время действия кода истекло." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (codeData.resolved && codeData.telegramUser) {
server.ts:        const telegramId = codeData.telegramUser.id;
server.ts:        const username = codeData.telegramUser.username;
server.ts:        const uid = `telegram_${telegramId}`;
server.ts:        const fullName = [codeData.telegramUser.first_name, codeData.telegramUser.last_name].filter(Boolean).join(" ") || `Telegram Player ${telegramId}`;
server.ts:
server.ts:        const email = `tg_${telegramId}@telegram-auth.game`;
server.ts:        const securePassword = crypto
server.ts:          .createHmac("sha256", TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN)
server.ts:          .update(telegramId)
server.ts:          .digest("hex");
server.ts:
server.ts:        // Consume the code so it can't be reused
server.ts:        pendingClientCodes.delete(upperCode);
server.ts:
server.ts:        return res.json({
server.ts:          success: true,
server.ts:          resolved: true,
server.ts:          email: email,
server.ts:          password: securePassword,
server.ts:          displayName: fullName,
server.ts:          photoURL: "",
server.ts:          user: {
server.ts:            uid: uid,
server.ts:            id: telegramId,
server.ts:            username: username,
server.ts:            displayName: fullName,
server.ts:            photoURL: ""
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      return res.json({ success: true, resolved: false });
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("Error polling client code:", err);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ success: false, error: err.message || "Ошибка сервера" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  // API to download pre-configured PC launcher with all source code zip
server.ts:  app.get("/api/download-launcher", (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      console.log("[Launcher API] Generating launcher zip on-the-fly...");
server.ts:      const zip = new AdmZip();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Root files to package
server.ts:      const rootFiles = [
server.ts:        "package.json",
server.ts:        "server.ts",
server.ts:        "desktop-main.cjs",
server.ts:        "УСТАНОВКА_ИГРЫ.bat",
server.ts:        "start.bat",
server.ts:        "tsconfig.json",
server.ts:        "vite.config.ts",
server.ts:        "index.html",
server.ts:        "metadata.json",
server.ts:        "firestore.rules",
server.ts:        "firebase-applet-config.json",
server.ts:        ".env.example"
server.ts:      ];
server.ts:
server.ts:      for (const file of rootFiles) {
server.ts:        const filePath = path.join(process.cwd(), file);
server.ts:        if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
server.ts:          zip.addLocalFile(filePath);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Add the entire src and public directories
server.ts:      const srcPath = path.join(process.cwd(), "src");
server.ts:      if (fs.existsSync(srcPath)) {
server.ts:        zip.addLocalFolder(srcPath, "src");
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const publicPath = path.join(process.cwd(), "public");
server.ts:      if (fs.existsSync(publicPath)) {
server.ts:        zip.addLocalFolder(publicPath, "public");
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const zipBuffer = zip.toBuffer();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      res.setHeader("Content-Type", "application/zip");
server.ts:      res.setHeader("Content-Disposition", "attachment; filename=clicker-launcher.zip");
server.ts:      res.send(zipBuffer);
server.ts:    } catch (err: any) {
server.ts:      console.error("[Launcher API] Failed to generate desktop launcher zip:", err);
server.ts:      res.status(500).send("Ошибка создания лаунчера: " + (err.message || err));
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
server.ts:    // Development Mode
server.ts:    const vite = await createViteServer({
server.ts:      server: { 
server.ts:        middlewareMode: true,
server.ts:        hmr: { server: httpServer }

server.ts:
server.ts:  httpServer.listen(PORT, "0.0.0.0", () => {
server.ts:    console.log(`Server listening on http://0.0.0.0:${PORT}`);
server.ts:    // Start background Firestore marketplace listener to sync listings with all players
server.ts:    listenToMarketplace().catch((err) => {
server.ts:      console.error("Marketplace listener routine failed:", err);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Start background real-time user database synchronizer to support 24/7 clan battles and persistency
server.ts:    syncUsersFromFirestore().catch((err) => {
server.ts:      console.error("User db synchronizer routine failed:", err);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Start background polling for Telegram Bot commands/login codes
server.ts:    startTelegramBotPolling().catch((err) => {
server.ts:      console.error("Bot polling routine crashed:", err);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Start background polling for VK Bot commands
server.ts:    startVkBotPolling().catch((err) => {
server.ts:      console.error("VK Bot polling routine crashed:", err);
server.ts:    });
server.ts:
server.ts:    // Start background interval for Clan Wars checking and ticking (runs every 1 second)
server.ts:    setInterval(() => {
server.ts:      if (!isGameRunning) return;
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        // 1. Calculate active clan production rates
server.ts:        const realScores = calculateClanProduction();
server.ts:        
server.ts:        // Add active simulation boost offsets
server.ts:        clanWarState.clanProductionScores = { ...realScores };
server.ts:        for (const cl in clProductionSimBoost) {
server.ts:          clanWarState.clanProductionScores[cl] = (clanWarState.clanProductionScores[cl] || 0) + clProductionSimBoost[cl];
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        
server.ts:        // 2. Check current phase
server.ts:        if (clanWarState.isWarActive) {
server.ts:          if (clanWarState.countdownSeconds > 0) {
server.ts:            clanWarState.countdownSeconds--;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Simulating real-time rival clicks and progress to make the battle a real live competition!
server.ts:            const triggeringClan = clanWarState.triggeringClan || null;
server.ts:            Object.keys(clanWarState.clansWarPoints).forEach(cName => {
server.ts:              // Only simulate rivals (clans other than our triggering clan)
server.ts:              if (cName !== triggeringClan) {
server.ts:                const rivalTapPower = Math.floor(Math.random() * 250) + 120; // 120-370 points per second
server.ts:                clanWarState.clansWarPoints[cName] = (clanWarState.clansWarPoints[cName] || 0) + rivalTapPower;
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            });
server.ts:          } else {
server.ts:            // War has concluded! Decide the victor
server.ts:            clanWarState.isWarActive = false;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            let winnerClan: string | null = null;
server.ts:            let maxPoints = -1;
server.ts:            
server.ts:            for (const clanName in clanWarState.clansWarPoints) {
server.ts:              const pts = clanWarState.clansWarPoints[clanName] || 0;
server.ts:              if (pts > maxPoints) {
server.ts:                maxPoints = pts;
server.ts:                winnerClan = clanName;
server.ts:              } else if (pts === maxPoints && pts > 0) {
server.ts:                // simple tie-breaker or multiple winners can be handled or left
server.ts:              }
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            if (winnerClan && maxPoints > 0) {
server.ts:              clanWarState.lastWarWinner = winnerClan;
server.ts:              
server.ts:              // Reward online members with coins and persist to Firestore
server.ts:              for (const player of players.values()) {
server.ts:                if (player.clan === winnerClan) {
server.ts:                  player.coins += clanWarState.lastWarWinnerReward;
server.ts:                  players.set(player.id, player);
server.ts:                  
server.ts:                  // Persist to Cloud Firestore so progress isn't lost (works 24/7)
server.ts:                  getAuthenticatedDb().then((dbInstance) => {
server.ts:                    const userRef = doc(dbInstance, "users", player.id);
server.ts:                    updateDoc(userRef, {
server.ts:                      coins: player.coins,
server.ts:                      updatedAt: new Date()
server.ts:                    }).catch((err) => {
server.ts:                      console.error(`[Clan Reward Fail] Could not update coins in Firestore for user ${player.id}:`, err);
server.ts:                    });
server.ts:                  }).catch((err) => {
server.ts:                    console.error("[Clan Reward DB Fail] Could not obtain DB instance:", err);
server.ts:                  });
server.ts:                }
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              
server.ts:              // Record war history
server.ts:              const warRecord = {
server.ts:                winner: winnerClan,
server.ts:                triggeringClan: clanWarState.triggeringClan || winnerClan,
server.ts:                points: { ...clanWarState.clansWarPoints },
server.ts:                timestamp: Date.now()
server.ts:              };
server.ts:              clanWarState.history.unshift(warRecord);
server.ts:              if (clanWarState.history.length > 10) {
server.ts:                clanWarState.history.pop();
server.ts:              }
server.ts:              
server.ts:              // Push announcement into the public chat log
server.ts:              const systemMsg = `⚔️ Битва Кланов завершена! Клан [${winnerClan}] одержал сокрушительную победу с результатом в ${maxPoints} очков! Соратники получают награду +${clanWarState.lastWarWinnerReward} 💰 монет!`;
server.ts:              chatMessages.push({
server.ts:                id: "sys_war_end_" + Date.now(),
server.ts:                playerId: "system",
server.ts:                playerName: "📜 СИСТЕМА",
server.ts:                clan: null,
server.ts:                text: systemMsg,
server.ts:                timestamp: new Date().toLocaleTimeString("ru-RU", { timeZone: "Europe/Moscow", hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" }),
server.ts:                color: "#ff3e3e"
server.ts:              });
server.ts:              if (chatMessages.length > 50) chatMessages.shift();
server.ts:            } else {
server.ts:              clanWarState.lastWarWinner = null;
server.ts:              const systemMsg = `⚔️ Битва Кланов завершилась вничью. Ни один клан не набрал боевых очков!`;
server.ts:              chatMessages.push({
server.ts:                id: "sys_war_end_" + Date.now(),

server.ts:            });
